name_cn:
M25046 Patent Silver Clasp
This Go-14 Malletage Medium bag from the 2024 Spring/Summer show is infused with a glossy patent leather body for a striking look. The quilted lambskin interprets the brand's classic Malletage pattern, while the polished LV Twist lock adds a refined touch. The chain and leather handles are both detachable, offering multiple styling possibilities.
23 x 16 x 10 cm
(L x H x W)
